details.en: Flights booked directly with airlines or through American Express Travel, on up to $500,000 in purchases per calendar year.
details.zhHans: 直接向航空公司或通过 American Express Travel 购买机票，每自然年合资格消费上限为 $500,000。

details.en: Eligible prepaid hotels booked through American Express Travel.
details.zhHans: 通过 American Express Travel 预订的合资格预付酒店。

details.en: The standard rate for other eligible purchases.
details.zhHans: 其他合资格消费的基础积攒倍率。

details.en: Prepaid hotels booked through AmexTravel.com or the Amex Travel App.
details.zhHans: 通过 AmexTravel.com 或 Amex Travel App 预订的预付酒店。

details.en: Up to $50,000 in eligible purchases per calendar year, then 1X.
details.zhHans: 每自然年前 $50,000 合资格消费为 4X，超过后为 1X。

details.en: Up to $25,000 in eligible purchases per calendar year, then 1X.
details.zhHans: 每自然年前 $25,000 合资格消费为 4X，超过后为 1X。

details.en: Flights booked directly with airlines or through AmexTravel.com or the Amex Travel App.
details.zhHans: 直接向航空公司或通过 AmexTravel.com、Amex Travel App 购买机票。

details.en: Eligible prepaid car rentals and cruises booked and paid through American Express Travel.
details.zhHans: 通过 American Express Travel 预订并支付的合资格预付租车和邮轮。

details.en: The standard rate for other eligible purchases.
details.zhHans: 其他合资格消费的基础积攒倍率。

details.en: Flights, hotels, rental cars, cruises, activities, and tours booked through Chase Travel. Purchases covered by a statement credit may not earn points.
details.zhHans: 通过 Chase Travel 预订的机票、酒店、租车、邮轮、活动和行程；已获得账单报销的消费可能不赚取积分。

details.en: Eligible bookings made directly with an airline or hotel.
details.zhHans: 直接向航空公司或酒店完成的合资格预订。

details.en: Eligible restaurant purchases, including qualifying takeout and delivery.
details.zhHans: 合资格餐厅消费，包括符合条件的外卖和配送。

details.en: The standard rate for other purchases.
details.zhHans: 其他消费的基础积攒倍率。

details.en: Flights, hotels, rental cars, cruises, activities, and tours booked through Chase Travel. Hotel-credit purchases may not earn points.
details.zhHans: 通过 Chase Travel 预订的机票、酒店、租车、邮轮、活动和行程；使用酒店报销额度的消费可能不赚取积分。

details.en: Eligible restaurant purchases, including qualifying takeout and delivery.
details.zhHans: 合资格餐厅消费，包括符合条件的外卖和配送。

category.en: Gas, EV charging, and vacation homes

details.en: Eligible gas-station and EV-charging purchases plus qualifying vacation-home brands.
details.zhHans: 合资格加油站、车辆充电消费，以及符合条件的度假屋品牌。

details.en: Eligible online grocery purchases and selected streaming services; exclusions apply.
details.zhHans: 合资格网购杂货和指定流媒体服务，适用除外规则。

details.en: Eligible travel purchases outside Chase Travel.
details.zhHans: Chase Travel 以外的合资格旅行消费。

details.en: The standard rate for other purchases.
details.zhHans: 其他消费的基础积攒倍率。

category.en: Capital One Travel hotels and rental cars
category.zhHans: Capital One Travel 酒店与租车

details.en: Hotels and rental cars booked through Capital One Travel.
details.zhHans: 通过 Capital One Travel 预订的酒店和租车。

category.en: Capital One Travel flights, vacation rentals, and activities
category.zhHans: Capital One Travel 机票、度假屋与活动

details.en: Flights, vacation rentals, and activities booked through Capital One Travel.
details.zhHans: 通过 Capital One Travel 预订的机票、度假屋和活动。

details.en: Eligible purchases made through the Capital One Entertainment ticketing platform.
details.zhHans: 通过 Capital One Entertainment 票务平台完成的合资格消费。

details.en: Unlimited miles on other purchases.
details.zhHans: 其他消费可按此基础倍率无限积攒里程。

title.en: Up to $300 hotel credit each half-year
title.zhHans: 每半年最高 $300 酒店报销

summary.en: Up to $600 per calendar year for eligible prepaid Fine Hotels + Resorts or The Hotel Collection bookings through American Express Travel.
summary.zhHans: 每个自然年最高 $600，适用于通过 American Express Travel 预付的合资格 FHR 或 The Hotel Collection 订单。

details.en: The benefit is split into January-June and July-December periods, with up to $300 available in each period. The Hotel Collection generally requires a minimum two-night stay.
details.zhHans: 权益分为 1-6 月和 7-12 月两个周期，每周期最高 $300。The Hotel Collection 通常要求至少入住两晚。

title.zhHans: 每月 $15 Uber Cash

summary.en: Receive $15 in Uber Cash each month, plus an additional $20 in December, for eligible U.S. rides and orders.
summary.zhHans: 每月获得 $15 Uber Cash，12 月额外获得 $20，适用于美国境内合资格行程和订单。

details.en: Add the eligible Platinum Card to the Uber account and use an American Express card for the transaction. Unused monthly Uber Cash does not roll over.
details.zhHans: 需要把合资格白金卡添加到 Uber 账户，并在交易时选择美国运通卡。未使用的月度额度不会结转。

title.zhHans: 最高 $200 航空杂费报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible incidental fees charged by one selected qualifying airline.
summary.zhHans: 选择一家合资格航空公司后，可报销符合条件的航空杂费。

details.en: Select a qualifying airline before using the benefit. Eligible incidental charges can include items such as checked-bag fees and in-flight refreshments; airfare is generally excluded.
details.zhHans: 使用前需选择一家合资格航空公司。符合条件的费用可包括托运行李和机上餐饮等杂费，机票通常不在报销范围内。

title.zhHans: Global Lounge Collection 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Access to participating Centurion, Priority Pass Select, Delta Sky Club, and other partner lounges under current terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行条款使用 Centurion、Priority Pass Select、Delta Sky Club 及其他合作贵宾室。

details.en: Enrollment may be required for some programs. Visit limits, same-day travel requirements, guests, and participating locations vary by lounge network.
details.zhHans: 部分项目需要注册。访问次数、当日乘机要求、同行客人和参与地点会因贵宾室网络而异。

title.zhHans: 每月 $10 Uber Cash

summary.en: Up to $120 per year in Uber Cash for eligible U.S. rides and Uber Eats orders.
summary.zhHans: 每年最高 $120 Uber Cash，适用于美国境内合资格行程和 Uber Eats 订单。

details.en: Add the Gold Card to the Uber account. Monthly amounts expire at the end of each month and an American Express card must be selected for the transaction.
details.zhHans: 需要把金卡添加到 Uber 账户。月度额度在当月底失效，交易时需选择美国运通卡。

title.zhHans: 每月最高 $10 餐饮报销

summary.en: Up to $120 per year in statement credits at participating dining partners after enrollment.
summary.zhHans: 注册后，在参与活动的餐饮合作商户消费，每年最高获得 $120 账单报销。

details.en: Enrollment is required. Eligible partners and purchase channels are defined by American Express and can change.
details.zhHans: 必须先注册。合资格合作商户和购买渠道由美国运通规定，并可能发生变化。

title.zhHans: 每月最高 $7 Dunkin' 报销

summary.en: Up to $84 per year in statement credits for eligible U.S. Dunkin' purchases after enrollment.
summary.zhHans: 注册后，在美国 Dunkin' 进行合资格消费，每年最高获得 $84 账单报销。

details.en: Enrollment is required. Purchases must be made with the eligible Gold Card at qualifying U.S. locations or channels.
details.zhHans: 必须先注册，并使用合资格金卡在美国参与活动的门店或渠道消费。

title.zhHans: $100 The Hotel Collection 入住消费额度

summary.en: A property credit toward eligible charges on qualifying Hotel Collection stays booked through American Express Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 American Express Travel 预订合资格 The Hotel Collection 住宿，可获得用于酒店内合资格消费的额度。

details.en: A minimum two-night stay is required. Eligible charges vary by property, and the credit is attached to each qualifying booking rather than a monthly or annual allowance.
details.zhHans: 至少入住两晚。可抵扣的消费因酒店而异，此额度按每笔合资格订单提供，而不是月度或年度固定额度。

title.zhHans: 每年 $300 旅行报销

summary.en: Automatic statement credits for a broad range of eligible travel purchases each account anniversary year.
summary.zhHans: 每个持卡周年年度内，广泛的合资格旅行消费可自动获得账单报销。

details.en: Chase applies the credit to purchases that code as travel, up to the annual limit. Purchases covered by the credit generally do not earn points.
details.zhHans: Chase 会对编码为旅行类别的消费自动使用额度，直至达到年度上限。被报销的消费通常不赚取积分。

title.en: Up to $500 annual The Edit hotel credit
title.zhHans: 每年最高 $500 The Edit 酒店报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible prepaid stays booked through The Edit by Chase Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 The Edit by Chase Travel 预付合资格住宿，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The current terms require a minimum two-night stay and limit each qualifying transaction to up to $250 in credit. Check Chase for property and booking restrictions.
details.zhHans: 现行条款要求至少入住两晚，每笔合资格交易最多报销 $250。酒店范围和预订限制请以 Chase 最新条款为准。

title.zhHans: 每半年最高 $150 餐饮报销

summary.en: Up to $300 per year at restaurants participating in Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables.
summary.zhHans: 在 Sapphire Reserve Exclusive Tables 参与餐厅消费，每年最高报销 $300。

details.en: The benefit is split into two six-month periods and applies only to participating restaurants and eligible purchase channels.
details.zhHans: 权益分为两个半年周期，仅适用于参与活动的餐厅和合资格购买渠道。

title.en: Chase Sapphire Lounge and Priority Pass access
title.zhHans: Chase Sapphire Lounge 与 Priority Pass 贵宾室

summary.en: Access participating Chase Sapphire Lounges and Priority Pass locations under current membership terms.
summary.zhHans: 按现行会员条款使用参与活动的 Chase Sapphire Lounge 和 Priority Pass 贵宾室。

details.en: Priority Pass Select is automatically activated for eligible primary cardmembers and authorized users. Guest rules, participating locations, and same-day travel requirements can change.
details.zhHans: 合资格主卡持有人和附属卡用户的 Priority Pass Select 会自动激活。同行客人政策、参与地点和当日乘机要求可能变化。

title.zhHans: 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: A package of trip cancellation, interruption, delay, luggage, rental-car, and purchase protections under the benefit guide.
summary.zhHans: 权益指南包含旅行取消、中断、延误、行李、租车和购物等多类保障。

details.en: Coverage limits, eligible travelers, required payment methods, exclusions, and claim deadlines vary. Review the current Guide to Benefits before relying on coverage.
details.zhHans: 保障额度、合资格旅行者、付款要求、除外责任和理赔期限各不相同。依赖保障前请查看最新 Guide to Benefits。

title.en: Up to $100 annual Chase Travel hotel credit
title.zhHans: 每年最高 $100 Chase Travel 酒店报销

summary.en: Statement credits for eligible hotel stays purchased through Chase Travel each account anniversary year.
summary.zhHans: 每个持卡周年年度，通过 Chase Travel 购买合资格酒店住宿可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is automatically applied to qualifying Chase Travel hotel purchases, up to the annual limit. Credited purchases generally do not earn points.
details.zhHans: 额度会自动用于合资格 Chase Travel 酒店消费，直至年度上限。被报销的消费通常不赚取积分。

title.zhHans: 最高 $120 快速通关申请费报销

summary.en: A statement credit for an eligible Global Entry, TSA PreCheck, or NEXUS application charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付合资格 Global Entry、TSA PreCheck 或 NEXUS 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The credit is available once every four years under current terms. Only one eligible application fee is reimbursed per benefit period.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，每四年可使用一次；每个权益周期仅报销一笔合资格申请费。

title.zhHans: 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: Built-in coverage can include trip cancellation, interruption, rental-car damage, baggage, purchase protection, and extended warranty.
summary.zhHans: 内置保障可包括旅行取消、中断、租车损失、行李、购物保障和延长保修。

details.en: Each coverage has separate eligibility rules, limits, exclusions, required payment methods, and claim deadlines. Review the current benefit guide.
details.zhHans: 每项保障都有独立的资格、额度、除外责任、付款方式和理赔期限，请查看最新权益指南。

title.zhHans: 每年 $300 Capital One Travel 额度

summary.en: An annual credit for eligible bookings made through Capital One Travel.
summary.zhHans: 通过 Capital One Travel 进行合资格预订时可使用年度旅行额度。

details.en: The credit is available to eligible primary account holders and expires at the next account-open anniversary if unused. See Capital One Travel terms for eligible bookings.
details.zhHans: 额度面向合资格主卡持有人，未使用部分会在下一个开户周年到期。合资格预订范围请查看 Capital One Travel 条款。

title.zhHans: Capital One Lounge 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Eligible cardholders can access participating Capital One Lounge locations under current access rules.
summary.zhHans: 合资格持卡人可按现行规则使用参与活动的 Capital One Lounge。

details.en: Present the eligible physical card or a digital lounge pass in the Capital One app. Guest rules, same-day travel requirements, and participating locations can change.
details.zhHans: 入场时需出示合资格实体卡或 Capital One App 中的电子贵宾室通行证。同行客人、当日乘机要求和参与地点可能变化。

title.zhHans: Priority Pass 贵宾室权益

summary.en: Eligible primary cardholders can use participating Priority Pass lounges after activating their complimentary membership.
summary.zhHans: 合资格主卡持有人激活免费会员后，可使用参与活动的 Priority Pass 贵宾室。

details.en: Activation is required through the Capital One app. Participating lounges, guest fees, access rules, and membership eligibility can change.
details.zhHans: 需要通过 Capital One App 激活。参与贵宾室、同行客人费用、入场规则和会员资格可能变化。

title.en: Up to $120 Global Entry or TSA PreCheck credit
title.zhHans: 最高 $120 Global Entry 或 TSA PreCheck 报销

summary.en: A statement credit for one eligible Global Entry or TSA PreCheck application fee charged to the card.
summary.zhHans: 使用该卡支付一笔合资格 Global Entry 或 TSA PreCheck 申请费，可获得账单报销。

details.en: The application credit is available once every four years under current terms. The charged application must be eligible and within the maximum amount.
details.zhHans: 按现行条款，每四年可使用一次。申请项目必须符合资格，且报销不超过最高额度。

title.en: Visa Infinite travel and purchase protections
title.zhHans: Visa Infinite 旅行与购物保障

summary.en: The card's current benefit guide includes eligible travel, rental-car, phone, and purchase protections.
summary.zhHans: 现行权益指南包含合资格旅行、租车、手机和购物等保障。

details.en: Benefits can vary by card network and account. Coverage limits, exclusions, required payment, and claim deadlines are controlled by the current Guide to Benefits.
details.zhHans: 权益可能因卡组织和账户而异，保障额度、除外责任、付款要求和理赔期限以最新 Guide to Benefits 为准。
